subcodes.first_line: O Khalil, the Sacrificed One of the Days of God, he offered up whatsoever he possessed in the path of the Friend, and all the Concourse on High [did marvel] [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا خلیل ذبیح ایام الهی آنچه را مالک بود در راه دوست فدا نمود جمیع ملا اعلی
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @love of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
